74734.subject: 🏳️ Anthropic needs France’s help
74734.body:
----------
######                  [Collaborate with us](https://6hhfxazcbpc.typeform.com/to/uXIl0IFH?utm_source=atlas&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=general_2026_05_11&utm_content=banner_post)


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8776fa6e-e2d0-4aec-9648-1bed6de3a659/GenAI_Daily_Banner.jpg?t=1778687445)
Caption: 


----------

----------
**Welcome back!** Today is about how much muscle AI has grown over governments, courts and your job. Washington switched off Anthropic's two best models for every foreign user on the planet, then watched Europe scramble for a way around it at the G7. The same week, the feds told a court that Elon's data center is too important to national security to follow clean-air law. And OpenAI poached the man who helped invent the tech all of this runs on, while Accenture says your company now has to onboard its AI agents like new hires.

**In today's Generative AI Newsletter:**

* **G7:** Why did the world's AI bosses get two hours alone with the G7?

* **xAI:** How did a polluting data center become a national security asset?

* **OpenAI:** Who did OpenAI just take from Google, and why does it sting?

* **Accenture:** What happens when your newest coworker is a bot HR has to manage?


----------

----------
## [France hosted Anthropic at G7 just to change Trump’s mind on Mythos](https://www.usnews.com/news/world/articles/2026-06-17/g7-leaders-vow-closer-ties-on-ai-as-they-hash-out-trusted-partners-scheme)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c52237a6-1680-4b11-b972-56f96d81726c/Beehiiv_01_-_Jun_18.png?t=1781776199)
Caption: 

Start on June 12. The US Commerce Department used national security export controls to ban Anthropic from giving its two most powerful models, Mythos 5 and Fable 5, to any foreign national.

Why? Amazon's CEO flagged a jailbreak that could unlock Mythos's ability to run cyberattacks, and the White House moved fast. 

Now jump to the G7 in Évian on Wednesday. 

France hosted, so Macron set the guest list, and he made AI the main course. He personally invited Sam Altman, sat him down with Anthropic's Dario Amodei, Google DeepMind's Demis Hassabis and a dozen more tech bosses across from Trump and the other leaders, and pitched a fix he's calling "trusted partners."

That fix is a workaround. It would let allied countries and companies use restricted US models like Mythos to build their own cyberdefenses, around the very ban Washington just imposed. 

Macron's case to Washington was that nobody keeps buying American AI if it can be switched off at any moment.

The strangest moment came from Altman, who told the room not to hand the job to companies like his. "We develop the technology, and the citizens of the free world make the rules," he said. Read that

74733.subject: Coinbase is replacing the crypto exchange model with a Financial OS built for AI Agents 🤖⚙️; Is Cursor really Spa…
74733.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/fintechpulse1091

Hey Everyone,
Good morning & happy Thursday! Today we’re diving into digital asset pioneer Coinbase, which is now replacing the crypto exchange model with a Financial Operating System for AI Agents (Coinbase’s System Update with a focus on key products & launches, what does it all tell us & which competitors should worry the most + bonus deep dive into Coinbase’s latest financials [ https://substack.com/redirect/bc84e9a3-2fd8-4f26-b65f-9c4e8f243245?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] & how Anthropic wants to be the AI OS for Wall Street [ https://substack.com/redirect/cb81d308-1bc3-4302-8950-0caadc812dd8?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside), and see if Cursor is really SpaceX’s Instagram Moment (what’s the deal really all about, how it compares to Facebook buying Instagram & what’s next + bonus deep dive into SpaceX [ https://substack.com/redirect/acf69818-b009-43ab-b4de-765faac5e110?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and Anthropic, which just Told AI Founders Exactly What to Build in 2026 [ https://substack.com/redirect/37510a00-cb91-40c7-9567-f9ce0e6281ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside). So let’s jump straight into the finnovative stuff 🌶️
Coinbase is replacing the crypto exchange model with a Financial OS built for AI Agents 🤖⚙️
The news 🗞️ While most of the market was debating Bitcoin price targets, digital asset pioneer Coinbase $COIN  just shipped its most ambitious product wave in the company’s history: tokenized 1:1-backed U.S. equities, an SEC-registered AI financial advisor, agent wallets with programmable guardrails, pre-IPO perpetuals for SpaceX [ https://substack.com/redirect/acf69818-b009-43ab-b4de-765faac5e110?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and crypto-backed mortgages.
Taken together, these moves reveal a company that has stopped iterating on a crypto exchange and started building a full financial operating system for both human users and autonomous AI agents.
The revenue data already tells part of the story. The competitive implications tell the rest.
Let’s unpack this...

Unsubscribe https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5hcy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWN0aW9uL2Rpc2FibGVfZW1haWw_.NfiW_xSlMMY0uFE_nbzYNqOkKH9Fi8UfsDiFcM3DAsQ?

74732.subject: MODRA 20. júna: Štartovací seminár & workshop
74732.body:
Získajte konkrétne kroky pre zapojenie, prácu s partnermi a rozvoj podnikania.

📍 MODRA – ŠTARTOVACÍ SEMINÁR & WORKSHOP

júna sa stretneme v Modre, v Hoteli pod Lipou, Harmónia 3018.

Ak už máte základné informácie o Asteria & Wexo, toto je vhodný moment posunúť sa ďalej — od predstavenia možností ku konkrétnym krokom, ktoré viete využiť v praxi.

Čo vás čaká?

➡️ ŠTARTOVACÍ SEMINÁR

Získate lepší prehľad o smerovaní, potenciáli a možnostiach zapojenia do Asteria & Wexo.

➡️ RESELLER & BUSINESS WORKSHOP

Prejdeme konkrétne kroky pre rozvoj podnikania, prácu s partnermi a praktické využitie systému v reálnych situáciách.

💰 Vstup: 39€

V cene sú zahrnuté materiály, videá, občerstvenie a coffee break.

Registrácia je povinná.

👉 Registrovať sa môžete cez tlačidlo nižšie:

22 Boulevard Plaza Tower 2, Dubai,
